note: Mathlib/NumberTheory/ModularForms/Basic.lean:75 - structure ModularForm extends SlashInvariantForm Γ k, requiring holomorphicity (holo') and boundedness at cusps (bdd_at_cusps'); this is the standard definition of a modular form of weight k for a congruence subgroup Γ ≤ SL(2,ℤ).

Mathlib/Order/PrimeSeparator.lean:44 - proves via Zorn's lemma that in a distributive lattice, any ideal disjoint from a filter extends to a prime ideal still disjoint from that filter; Boolean algebras are distributive lattices, so BPI is the specialization of this lattice-theoretic separator theorem, not a bespoke Boolean-algebra statement.
